translations.en: He prohibited consuming usury, bearing false witness to it, and issuing usury. He (peace be upon him) said: 'Allah curses the consumer of usury, its dealer, its issuer, and its witnesses.' He prohibited lending on condition of sale. He prohibited two sales in one transaction. He prohibited selling what you do not have. He prohibited selling what cannot be guaranteed. He prohibited shaking hands with the dhimmi. He prohibited reciting poetry or announcing lost items in the mosque. He prohibited unsheathing swords in the mosque. He prohibited striking the faces of animals. He prohibited a man from looking at the private parts of his Muslim brother, and said: 'Whoever stares at his brother's private parts, seventy thousand angels curse him.' He prohibited a woman from looking at another woman's private parts. He prohibited blowing into food, drink, or the place of prostration. He prohibited praying in graveyards, on roads, in roundabouts, in valleys, in camel pens, and atop the Ka'ba.
